name: GDPR (core articles subset)
description: Core GDPR themes for gap analysis demos. Not legal advice; expand with counsel for production.

controls.title: Principles (Art. 5)
controls.description: Lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, minimization, accuracy, storage limitation, integrity/confidentiality, accountability.

controls.title: Lawfulness of processing (Art. 6)
controls.description: Documented lawful basis for each processing activity.

controls.title: Transparent information (Art. 12–14)
controls.description: Privacy notices and response to data subject requests.

controls.title: Data protection by design (Art. 25)
controls.description: Technical and organisational measures from design time.

controls.title: Security of processing (Art. 32)
controls.description: Appropriate security including encryption, resilience, testing.

controls.title: Breach notification (Art. 33–34)
controls.description: 72-hour regulator notice and data-subject notice when required.

controls.title: DPIA (Art. 35)
controls.description: Data protection impact assessments for high-risk processing.
